nasb.text: “Now behold, today I am going the way of all the earth, and you know in all your hearts and in all your souls that not one word of all the good words which the Lord your God spoke concerning you has failed; all have been fulfilled for you, not one of them has failed.

esv.text: “And now I am about to go the way of all the earth, and you know in your hearts and souls, all of you, that not one word has failed of all the good things that the Lord your God promised concerning you. All have come to pass for you; not one of them has failed.

cnv.text: “看哪，我今天要走世人必經的路了。你們清清楚楚知道耶和華你們的　神應許賜福給你們的話，沒有一句落空；完全應驗在你們身上，沒有一句落空。

ccb.text: “我快要走完人世的路程了。你们深知你们的上帝耶和华赐给你们的一切美好应许没有一句落空，都已经应验了。
